item.title: 多头潜在控制：LLM 代理决策的统一接口
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14277v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents, but reliable agentic behavior requires more than next-token prediction. At inference time, it is preferred that an agent can decide whether to proceed with its current reasoning, defer to a stronger model, request
